connections.quality_notes: W8 (kt_1783578413922_2f6584, 2026-07-10): frontier judgment gate in the chain. Source: ~/bin/aero-fable-judge. Route: LiteLLM :4000, model alias fable-judge -> claude-fable-5 (fallback claude-opus-4-8) via cliproxy pool. Contract: govern/judge/prompts/ (chain-verify-verdict.md + carding-review.md). Exit codes: PASS=0, INCONCLUSIVE=3, FAIL=5, JUDGE-UNAVAILABLE=7 (retryable). Mechanical fallback ladder: fable-judge -> gpt-5.5 -> gemini-2.5-pro (provider-diverse by design). C8 ENFORCED: every verdict ledgered through govern before returning. AERO_JUDGE=on required for live calls from aero-verified-complete.

Chain: preflight(auth) -> seat-launch-gate(repo) -> fetch card -> claim -> worktree-per-story -> builder loop (headless CC via :8317 pool) -> PR -> codex second key (aero-codex-verify) -> Gemini third key -> merge -> SK1 close gate (aero-verified-complete). connections.gaps_notes: W8 audit 2026-07-10: no registry row until now. govern/ledger/ledger.db is EMPTY (0 bytes) — the ledger leg appears severed (post_to_ledger calls best-effort). govern.db has 824 judge verdicts since Jul 9.
connections.name: aero-verified-complete
connections.quality_notes: W8 (kt_1783578413922_2f6584, 2026-07-10): SK1 — the ONLY card closer. Source: ~/bin/aero-verified-complete. Blocking close gate: runs the card's own VERIFICATION-PROBE and checks against VERIFICATION-EXPECT regex. Card reaches done ONLY if probe output matches. Exit codes: 0=PASS(close), 2=board error, 3=no probe(fail-closed), 4=trivial/tautological probe(reject), 5=mismatch(refuse). Epic chain-verify: re-runs all child probes live before closing the parent. Board target: http://127.0.0.1:8649/mcp (overridable via AERO_KANBAN_MCP). Integrates aero-fable-judge (AERO_JUDGE=on) for verdict gating. Govern ledger: posts outcome event after successful close.

connections.collecting_notes: Presence heartbeat store (desk-redesign T1/T6, registered 2026-07-08). Every Claude session self-registers via presence-heartbeat.py hook: session id, desk/window name, mission/task, busy|idle, ctx%. Dispatch "which pane is free" reads this, replacing capture-pane scraping (mis-send class). Staleness 900s; */10 prune cron; floor-doctor presence_staleness check. Channel-contract: ambient state ONLY, never messages.

connections.collecting_notes: BUSINESS-scoped (§16) LIVE active-branch-per-workspace producer. Reads CURRENT git branch + dirty-state + last commit of every active business workspace/seat across the estate: Henry aerodeck seats (active pane cwd via local tmux), Mally Mac business checkouts (ssh mally ~/Documents/Claude/*), shared aeros worktrees (ssh aeros). Powers the "Workspaces — live branches" panel on AerOS /system/code (PR aerodeck-ai/aerodeck-template#461). LIFE/personal host NEVER enumerated. Read-only: captures pane cwd + read-only git, never drives keys into panes. Created 2026-06-29.
connections.name: aero-workspace-branches
connections.quality_notes: [created 2026-06-29 workspace-branches-producer]
connections.query_method: read JSON feed via getWorkspaceBranches() in apps/aeros/src/lib/data-db.ts; produced by ~/bin/aero-workspace-branches.sh

connections.gaps_notes: pre-commit guard refusing direct commits in designated SHARED long-lived checkouts (config: ~/.config/aero-worktree-guard.conf, currently aerodeck-template + ~/bin) unless AERO_WT_OK=1; wired via core.hooksPath -> ~/.config/aero-git-hooks/pre-commit (never touches another repos .git/hooks directly). Built for the 2026-06-18 Mally-WIP-sweep hazard. kt_1783084235327_7d163b
connections.name: aero-worktree-guard

connections.collecting_notes: Receiving side of the AeroMeet meeting-end webhook (card kt_1783205743738_fec811). Loopback-only :8931 systemd service on aerodeck; durably queues meeting-completed events from AeroMeet (frontend/src-tauri/src/summary/service.rs notify_meeting_genesis_webhook, default target http://127.0.0.1:8931/webhook/meeting-completed) into meeting_genesis_queue.db table meeting_events. Consumer is the Meeting Genesis delta rail (sibling card kt_1783205743575_421813, not yet built as of 2026-07-05). This is additive to, not a replacement for, the existing pull-based customs-house v2 intake (id 295 meetily-customs-house-ingest) -- AeroMeet still feeds 295 via the same local sqlite schema unchanged by the rebrand; this webhook is a NEW push-based delta signal alongside it.
connections.name: aeromeet-webhook
connections.query_method: GET /health for liveness; sqlite3 read on meeting_genesis_queue.db for queued rows

connections.collecting_notes: Agent-inbox act-and-ack channel (desk-redesign T2/T6, registered 2026-07-08). SQLite. msg_class act|fyi (unknown defaults ACT/loud); doorbell renders act items one-line + FYI counter; SessionStart injects unread per address. Channel-contract law: carries act-and-ack ONLY (pack-ready, shipped: heads-ups, authed-step requests, touching-your-surface warnings) — never ambient status, worker chatter, or decisions.
connections.name: agent-inbox
connections.query_method: aero-msg send|inbox|doorbell|ack|sweep|query

connections.collecting_notes: Verified 2026-06-24: doctor green alive=5/5; seat tests PANE_OK + PERSONAL_OK. Source-of-truth: Company Brain record 13169 + infra memory note oauth-pool-architecture.
connections.name: claude-oauth-seat-pool
connections.quality_notes: Per-pane STATIC-token OAuth pool across aerodeck + personal (rebuilt 2026-06-24, replacing shared-profile+hot-swap). Each seat draws its own account from 5 static setup-tokens = parallel capacity (kills the all-seats-on-one rate-limit). ZERO refreshers anywhere, so the 2026-06-23 dual-refresh cascade is STRUCTURALLY impossible. cliproxy :8317 is Claude-free (Codex/Gemini only). Retired the cascade machinery (keepalive/sync/rotate-timer); backups in ~/bin/.retired-pool-20260624T113005Z + ~/pool-cleanup-backup-*.tar.gz. Limits: 5 accounts shared by aerodeck+personal+mally (capacity ceiling); running seats pinned to launch account (static tokens do not live-migrate, recycle to rebalance); ~yearly manual re-mint (doctor pre-warns).
connections.query_method: Per-host ~/.claude-pool/<acct>/ holds 5 static setup-tokens. claude-pool-pick assigns one account PER PANE by live quota (lease round-robin). Quota feed http://100.74.200.84:8930/api/swiftbar/oauth.json. aero-pool-doctor pages when live accounts < floor 2. Add an account: claude setup-token (browser) then claude-pool-add-oat <email>.

Replaces the retired aeros vectos G9 test. First green 2026-06-21 (1,109,099 rows). Runs ~2h (slow Mac->personal link).
